economic_notes: Consolidated entities include We'koqma'q Housing Projects, We'koqma'q One Stop, and We'koqma'q Contracting Incorporated. Trout farm inventory operations noted. Fitness Centre included in inventory.
notes: Consolidated statements include We'koqma'q Housing Projects, We'koqma'q One Stop, and We'koqma'q Contracting Incorporated. Net debt position of $20,541,935. Bank indebtedness of $17,797,026 representing a line of credit from Peace Hills. HST liability of $469,128 under repayment agreement with CRA stemming from 2011 agreement. Government transfers breakdown between federal departments not individually itemized in statements shown; isc_funding set to 0 as ISC-specific amount not separately disclosed. Trout farm inventory significant at $6,318,447. CMHC housing mortgages significant component of long-term debt.
